# Pixie Web Solutions

> Pixie Web Solutions is a premium web design and development agency based in Kochi, Kerala, India. We specialise in building pixel-perfect, high-performance websites for businesses across India. Our packages start at ₹5,000, and we bring enterprise-grade quality to every project — from lean startups to growing corporations.

## About

- [About Pixie Web Solutions](https://pixiewebs.com/about): Learn about our story, our team, and the core values — Excellence, Transparency, Innovation, Collaboration, Empathy, and Impact — that guide every project we take on.

## Services & Pricing

- [Services Overview](https://pixiewebs.com/services): A detailed look at all our web design and development service packages, our capabilities, and what makes us the right choice for your business.
- [Starter Package – ₹5,000](https://pixiewebs.com/services): Ideal for small businesses, portfolios, and startups. Includes 5 professionally designed pages, responsive design, modern UI/UX, basic SEO, contact form, and fast-loading structure.
- [Business Package – ₹9,000](https://pixiewebs.com/services): For growing businesses. Includes up to 8 pages, custom UI/UX, enhanced SEO, WhatsApp integration, performance optimisation, animations, and social media integration.
- [Premium Package – ₹15,000](https://pixiewebs.com/services): Enterprise-level websites. Includes up to 12 custom-designed pages, advanced SEO, interactive elements, admin/dashboard features, and priority post-launch support.

## Portfolio & Work

- [Our Works](https://pixiewebs.com/works): Browse our portfolio of completed projects spanning e-commerce, fintech, healthcare, real estate, AI analytics, blockchain, SaaS, social networking, edtech, and travel industries.

## Contact

- [Get in Touch](https://pixiewebs.com/contact): Start a project, request a quote, or ask any question. We respond quickly and are happy to discuss your goals.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://pixiewebs.com/privacy): How Pixie Web Solutions collects, uses, and protects your data.
- [Terms of Service](https://pixiewebs.com/terms): The legal terms governing use of our website and services.
- [Cookie Policy](https://pixiewebs.com/cookies): Information on how we use cookies on our website.
